channel.title: ThreatDigest Hub - Curated Cyber Incidents
channel.description: A curated list of recent cyber incidents, attacks, and security threats.

item.title: [DARK WEB] ThreatFox: ValleyRAT — 8 new IOCs detected
item.description:
ThreatFox Database
Indicators of Compromise (IOCs) on ThreatFox are associated with a certain malware fas. A malware sample can be associated with only one malware family. The page below gives you an overview on indicators of compromise associated with valleyrat .

item.title: [DARK WEB] ThreatFox: ClearFake — 10 new IOCs detected
item.description:
ThreatFox Database
Indicators of Compromise (IOCs) on ThreatFox are associated with a certain malware fas. A malware sample can be associated with only one malware family. The page below gives you an overview on indicators of compromise associated with clearfake .

item.title: How Investors May Respond To Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) Cyber Breach Exposing Data But Sparing Surgical Robots
item.description: In recent days, Intuitive Surgical disclosed that a targeted phishing-related cybersecurity breach gave an unauthorized third party access to certain internal IT business applications, exposing limited customer and employee data but leaving its da Vinci and Ion robotic platforms fully operational. This incident highlights how cybersecurity and data-protection practices are becoming as important to hospitals and investors as surgical performance when evaluating robotic-surgery partners. We’ll ...
